titleStmt.title: SII 36.169: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 169. (A.R. No. 169 of 1910.) ERŌḌE, ERODE TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Ardrakapālēśvara temple.

summary.p: The given details of date correspond to A.D. 1510. However, the Kaliyuga quoted in the inscription is wrong. Instead of Śaka, the Sālivāhaṇa era has been named. However the cyclic year Prajōtpati, Tai, pūrva paksha, 7th day Monday, uttirattādi, corresponds to A.D. 1510.

Damaged. Gift of 15 dēvarāyaṉ poṉ, to Toṇḍīśvaramuḍaiya-Tambirānār at Īrōḍu (Erōḍe) in Kāñchittuṇḍam, a subdivision of Mēlkarai-nāḍu which was a district of Koṅgu-maṇḍalam, for providing food offerings during the makara-saṅkrānti period by Ādiyappa Gavuṇḍaṉ Mallai •••Gavuṇḍan, one of the members of Okkal community from Ummattūr-sīrmai. The money was received by two officials of the temple and out of the interest accrued from the deposit they agreed to provide some food items to the deity without fail. The interest for one poṉ was calculated at the rate of 10 paṇam per month.
Published in ERMK., Vol. I, No. 1010/2003, p. 30-31.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran hariyarāya vibhāṭan bhāṣekkut tappuvarāyar gaṇṭan mūvarāyar gaṇḍan kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu koṭātāṉ ṇḍan Īḻantirai koṇṭu m pirāṉ Aśvapati gajapati narapati navakOṭi nārāyaṇan pūrvva takṣiṇa paścima Uttara catusamutrādhivati
parvvata rāhuttarkkuc cellāniṉṟa ( kaliyuga) cālivāhana cakhābtam 1000 4 100 3 10 2kku mel cellāniṉṟa prajōtpatdi varuṣam tai mātam tti somavāramum Uttiraṭṭātiyum pūrvvattu saptamiyum peṟṟa nāḷ koṅku maṇṭalattu melkaraināṭṭuk kāñcittuṇṭattil Īroṭṭil [ toṇṭīśvara] muṭaiya tampirāṉāṟku mel nāṭṭil Ummattūṟ cīrmaiyil Ātiyaṟaiyil Okkal makkaḷil Ātiyappa kavuṇṭaṉ mallai kavuṇṭaṉeṉ
paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu yiṟṟaināḷ makarasaṅkrān=ti puṇyakālattile toṇṭayappayaṟku Orunerattil pūjaik kaṭṭaḷaikku yintak koyilil stānikaṉ Ālampāya gotrattil toṇṭarkaḷ nayiṉār tempaiya piḷḷaiyum ciṇṇamantiyār deventira piḷḷaikkum Āka yivviruvar vacam Aṉṟāṭu vaḻaṅkum naṟpoṉ tevarāyaṉ po 10 5 yip poṉ patiṉañcukkum Immātam mutal mātam Oṉṟukku pattu
paṇam viḻukkāṭu varuṣam Oṉṟukku kattiyāṇam kaṭṭippoṉ pattukkum nāḷtoṟum Oru nērattil pūcaikku Amutupaṭi 10 2 payaṟupaṭi (1/2) kaṟi mūṉṟu Uppu miḷaku neypaṭi 9 paḻam 4 pākku 6 veṟṟilai 10 2 Āka yimmaruvāti naṭattak kaṭavārāka cantrādittavarai yintap pūcai naṭattak kaṭavārākavum
Digital edition of SII 36.169 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
